texto: It’s not about being ready or feeling prepared all the time
autor: sometimes you just have to do what you know you have to do. And when you do – you will always see that you’re more ready and more prepared than you realize. Never doubt yourself or you may never do anything of significance.
explicacao: Citação de sometimes you just have to do what you know you have to do. And when you do – you will always see that you’re more ready and more prepared than you realize. Never doubt yourself or you may never do anything of significance. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It’s not about being ready or feeling prepared all the time” articula tempo, a-j-darkholme, rise-of-the-morningstar em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao-noturna.
